p.strong: Full Deployment Pipeline, Security, and Data Flow

div.p: Run Modes: --smoke : smoke_test (~10s) --full : Snakemake suite (~1hr) default : single benchmark
SSE-S3 encryption Block all public access
S3 Permissions: GetObject, PutObject, DeleteObject, ListBucket Scoped to bucket ARN
CloudWatch Permissions: CreateLogGroup/Stream, PutLogEvents Scoped to log group ARN
